description_long: This object is a computer motherboard, featuring a flat rectangular circuit board densely populated with various electronic components. It includes multiple slots for RAM modules, visible as long blue and black connectors, and several PCIe slots for expansion cards. The board is equipped with a range of capacitors, integrated circuits, and heat sinks, as well as a cluster of I/O ports along one edge for connecting peripherals. Metallic traces and solder points are visible across the surface, connecting the different components. The overall color scheme is a mix of metallic gray, blue, black, and some green, with a combination of plastic and metal parts. This type of object is typically found inside desktop computers or workstations, often in office, garage, or tech repair urban environments.
description: A rectangular computer motherboard with blue and black RAM slots, various electronic components, and a cluster of I/O ports along one edge. The surface is densely packed with metallic and plastic parts.
description_view_0: The motherboard is seen from a low angle, highlighting the I/O ports and RAM slots on the right side.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the RAM slots and expansion slots, with the heat sinks and capacitors more visible in the background.
description_view_2: The I/O ports are most prominent in this view, with the full width of the motherboard and various connectors clearly visible.
description_view_3: The RAM slots are directly facing the viewer, with the rest of the board's components receding into the background.
